title: FirePermitApplication
description: An application for an FDNY fire permit, Certificate of Operation, or inspection request. NET-NEW: there is NO public API for the FDNY permitting workflow — today applicants file and track permits only inside FDNY Business (fires.fdnycloud.org), an Accela Civic Platform (Citizen Access) application, or on paper. This schema serves both the read surface (list/get an applicant's own applications) and the write surface (submit a new application).

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application / record number (Accela record id). Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by FDNY, not the applicant.

permitType.description: The kind of FDNY authorization being applied for.
enum: Place of Assembly Certificate of Operation

category.description: Optional finer permit category / activity within the permit type.

apartment.description: Unit / suite within the premises, if applicable.

businessName.description: Name of the applying business or responsible party.

description.description: Free-text description of the activity, equipment, or work the permit covers.

certificateOfFitnessNumber.description: Related C of F number ('COF_NUM'), when the activity must be supervised by a certificate holder.

requestedInspectionDate.description: Preferred inspection date, when the workflow requires an inspection.
